name: Transfer
description: Dual-list transfer picker — left/right with arrows.

api.name: Transfer
api.description: Dual-list transfer picker — left/right with arrows.

parameters.name: ShowSelectAll
parameters.description: When true (default), each panel header shows a select-all checkbox that toggles every enabled, currently-visible (filtered) item in that panel. The checkbox reflects an indeterminate state when only some items are selected.

records.name: TransferItem
records.signature: TransferItem(string Label, string Value, bool Disabled = false)
records.description: A transfer row. A Disabled item can't be selected or moved (its checkbox is disabled and a select-all skips it) and renders dimmed.

examples.title: OnChange — interactive
examples.code:
<Transfer @bind-SourceItems="_source" @bind-TargetItems="_target"
          OnChange="@(args => _lastChange = $"Moved {args.MovedItems.Count} item(s) → {(args.Direction == ""right"" ? ""Selected"" : ""Available"")}")"
          SourceTitle="Available" TargetTitle="Selected" />
@if (_lastChange is not null)
{
    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Last change: @_lastChange</Lumeo.Text>
}

@code { private string? _lastChange; }

mdSummary:
# Transfer

Dual-list transfer picker — left/right with arrows.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Drag & Drop
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/transfer

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Transfer | SourceItems | `List<TransferItem>?` | `` |  |
| Transfer | SourceItemsChanged | `EventCallback<List<TransferItem>>` | `` |  |
| Transfer | TargetItems | `List<TransferItem>?` | `` |  |
| Transfer | TargetItemsChanged | `EventCallback<List<TransferItem>>` | `` |  |
| Transfer | SourceTitle | `string?` | `` |  |
| Transfer | TargetTitle | `string?` | `` |  |
| Transfer | OnChange | `EventCallback<TransferChangeEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| Transfer | ShowSearch | `bool` | `` |  |
| Transfer | ShowSelectAll | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), each panel header shows a select-all checkbox that toggles every enabled, currently-visible (filtered) item in that panel. The checkbox reflects an indeterminate state when only some items are selected. |
| Transfer | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Transfer | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `SourceItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<List<TransferItem>>`)
- `TargetItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<List<TransferItem>>`)
- `OnChange` (`EventCallback<TransferChangeEventArgs>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Transfer />
```
